AboutSection.openingSub: Get to know us closely before your journey begins.

feature1.title: Premium Experience in the Industry
feature1.description: As VIP Booking, throughout our deep-rooted history of over ten years in the industry, we have always aimed to go beyond an ordinary transportation service. We don't just provide transportation for our guests from one point to another; we make them feel luxury, elegance, and absolute exclusivity in its purest form at every second from the planning stage of the journey to the moment of arrival. With our visionary service approach that pays attention to details, we meticulously craft each route like a work of art, redefining modern travel standards and offering to exceed your expectations every time as a standard.

feature2.title: Uninterrupted VIP Service
feature2.description: We operate with uncompromising time management, absolute punctuality, and flawless logistical planning principles at global standards. Regardless of the time of day, how delayed your flight is, or which corner of the world you are in, our 24/7 active operations center equipped with superior technology is at your service with our team of professional drivers, each trained in advanced driving techniques, crisis management, and protocol. From airport pickups to critical business meetings and international special events, we plan every detail and possible scenario of your trip with great professionalism on your behalf.

feature3.title: Safety and Satisfaction
feature3.description: The safety and unshakable peace of mind of you, your family, and your esteemed business partners are our most uncompromising and sacred priority. All vehicles in our extensive ultra-luxury segment fleet are equipped with the highest level of international active and passive safety protocols, and every journey is flawlessly executed based on complete confidentiality and high security. Thanks to the multimedia systems, premium refreshments, and isolated interior structure designed entirely for your comfort, you can get away from all the chaos of the outside world, just sit back, and enjoy the moment, luxury, and safe journey.

ContactSection.subTitle: Contact
ContactSection.description: You can contact our professional team at any time for your transfer requests, special events, or questions.

PricingSection.subtitle: Transparent Pricing
PricingSection.description: No surprises or hidden fees. Explore our fixed VIP Vito transfer rates for popular routes.
PricingSection.infoText: Our prices include highway, bridge, and tunnel toll fees. You can get an instant custom quote for a different location or private tours not listed here.
PricingSection.popularRoutesDesc: Starting transfer rates for popular routes.
PricingSection.priceInfoText: Prices shown are starting transfer rates. The final price is determined during the reservation step based on vehicle type, passenger count, and round-trip selection.

TestimonialSection.description: Check out the experiences of our guests who chose us for various journeys, from airport transfers to special events.

t1.name: Ahmet Yılmaz
t1.text: I requested a vehicle allocation all day for my meetings. The interior cleanliness, Wi-Fi speed, and the captain's professionalism were world-class. Will definitely choose again.

t2.name: Selin Karaca
t2.text: We were picked up from Antalya Airport for our late-night flight. The vehicle was there exactly on time, and the ride was so smooth I fell asleep. A wonderful experience.

t3.name: Caner & Cansu
t3.text: We rented a Maybach series vehicle for our honeymoon. The champagne service, starlight ceiling, and luxury interior details gave our vacation a tremendous start.

t4.name: Murat Demir
t4.text: We have been entrusting our VIP guests with our eyes closed for years. The operations team is very fast, the vehicles are always sparkling. One of our best partners in the industry.

t5.name: Elena Petrova
t5.text: Our driver spoke Russian and gave us great tips about the city. Thanks to the VIP design with a partition, we felt completely isolated and safe as a family.

t6.name: Ozan Tekin
t6.text: No surprise prices, no being late, no stress. I made a reservation through the app in seconds and completed the payment. My only choice for corporate transportation.

PrivacyPolicyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicyPage.description: Information regarding how personal data is processed on the VIP Booking website and during reservation processes.
PrivacyPolicyPage.warning: This text has been prepared for general information purposes. It is recommended to be reviewed by a legal expert according to your company's actual data processing operations.

1.title: 1. Data Controller
1.content: This privacy policy has been prepared to explain how personal data is processed in the website, reservation, and communication processes offered by VIP Booking Turizm Taşımacılık Sanayi Ve Tic.Ltd.Şti.

2.title: 2. Collected Personal Data
2.content: Information such as name, surname, phone number, e-mail address, pick-up and drop-off points, reservation date, passenger details, special requests, and message contents may be processed during reservation, communication, or quote request processes.

3.title: 3. Purposes of Processing Personal Data
3.content: Your personal data is processed for the purposes of receiving reservation requests, planning transfer services, ensuring customer communication, creating quotes, improving service quality, and fulfilling legal obligations.

4.title: 4. Transfer of Personal Data
4.content: Your personal data may be shared limitedly with the operations team, drivers, technical service providers, and authorized public institutions if necessary to provide the service. Your data is not shared unnecessarily or for unrelated purposes with third parties.

5.title: 5. Retention Period
5.content: Your personal data is retained for the period necessary for the purpose of processing and within the legal retention periods stipulated in the relevant legislation. Upon expiration, the data is deleted, destroyed, or anonymized.

6.title: 6. Cookie Usage
6.content: Strictly necessary, preference, analytical, and marketing cookies may be used on our website. Strictly necessary cookies are required for the safe and correct operation of the site. Other cookies are activated based on user preference.

7.title: 7. Cookie Preferences
7.content: You can change your cookie preferences at any time via the 'Cookie Preferences' link at the bottom of the website. Strictly necessary cookies cannot be disabled; other categories can be toggled on or off at your request.

8.title: 8. Your Rights
8.content: You have the right to request information, request correction, deletion or destruction of your personal data, object to processing activities, and exercise other rights under the applicable legislation.

9.title: 9. Contact
9.content: You can contact us via reservation@vipbooking.com for your requests regarding the privacy policy and your personal data.

TermsOfUsePage.title: Terms of Use
TermsOfUsePage.description: Basic terms of use applicable when utilizing the VIP Booking website, reservation, and transfer services.
TermsOfUsePage.warning: This text has been prepared for general information purposes. It is recommended to be reviewed by a legal expert according to your actual reservation, cancellation, refund, and liability processes.

1.title: 1. General Provisions
1.content: These terms of use regulate the basic rules regarding the reservation, quote request, communication, and transfer services offered through the VIP Booking website. Users using the website are deemed to have accepted these terms.

2.title: 2. Scope of Service
2.content: VIP Booking offers VIP transportation services such as airport transfer, city transfer, special event transfer, and similar services. The scope of service may vary depending on the selected route, vehicle type, number of passengers, and reservation details.

3.title: 3. Reservation Process
3.content: When creating a reservation, users must provide date, time, pick-up and drop-off points, number of passengers, contact information, and special requests (if any) completely and accurately. The user is responsible for any disruptions that may occur due to incomplete or incorrect information.

4.title: 4. Pricing
4.content: The prices shown on the website may vary depending on the selected route, vehicle type, trip type, and extra requests. The final fee is notified to the user during the reservation step or quote process. Listed prices may be starting or total transfer fees unless stated otherwise.

5.title: 5. Extra Requests
5.content: Baby seats, in-vehicle extra products, special greetings, or similar requests are provided subject to availability. An additional fee may be charged for extra requests and this fee may be reflected in the reservation total.

6.title: 6. Cancellations and Changes
6.content: Reservation cancellation or change requests must be forwarded to the VIP Booking team as soon as possible. Cancellation and change conditions may vary depending on the type of service, reservation time, and operational status.

7.title: 7. User Responsibilities
7.content: The user accepts that the information transmitted through the website is accurate and up-to-date. The user is responsible for any delay, cancellation, or service disruption that may occur due to incorrect location, date, time, or contact information.

8.title: 8. Limitations of Liability
8.content: VIP Booking takes the necessary care to provide the service as planned. However, liability may be limited due to traffic, weather conditions, road closures, flight changes, force majeure, or delays caused by third parties.

9.title: 9. Intellectual Property
9.content: The design, text, images, logo, brand, and other content on the website belong to their respective right holders. These contents cannot be copied, reproduced, or used for commercial purposes without permission.

10.title: 10. Contact
10.content: For your questions regarding the terms of use or service processes, you can contact us via reservation@vipbooking.com.
